summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UK Salary Sacrifice & Savings Optimiser iteration 2 focusing on two new features: Tax Year Selector (2024/25 and 2025/26) and Monthly/Annual Display Toggle. All new features working correctly with proper tax calculations and display mode switching.
passed_tests: Tax year selector shows both '2024/25' and '2025/26' options with '2025/26' as default
Annual/Monthly toggle buttons work with Annual active by default
Monthly/Annual toggle in Step 1: £110k salary shows correct values - Annual: Income Tax £32,432/yr, Take-Home £73,357/yr; Monthly: Income Tax £2,703/mo, Take-Home £6,113/mo
Tax year switching works correctly between 2024/25 and 2025/26
Step 2 pension scheme with Monthly toggle: summary bar shows monthly values (£917/mo sacrifice, £568/mo tax saved) and annual values (£11,000/yr sacrifice, £6,820/yr tax saved)
Scotland tax region selection works correctly
Scotland tax bands testing: £30k salary shows appropriate tax calculations for both tax years
Display mode toggle persists across all steps and updates all values consistently
Tax calculations are accurate for different salary levels, regions, and tax years
Form validation works correctly - Continue button enables when required fields are filled
60% tax trap warning displays correctly for £110k salary in PA taper zone
Marginal tax rates display correctly (60% for £110k England, 21% for £30k Scotland)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
